title: Packet 079 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 079 cockpit state-sync authority through the parent-root boundary and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity so the compact lane register is durable on the authoritative host mirror.
dependency_note: Packet 079 corrected the compact PM cockpit locally. This gate records publication to the GitHub-canonical parent-root boundary and restoration of the authoritative host mirror to clean parity.
next_packet_candidate: No automatic successor; open a new Olares packet only when a concrete new Olares need or friction appears.
sql_permission_note: This publication gate authorizes no source/test runtime mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no runtime or service mutation, no AI-services expansion, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
